_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Coordinate with the appropriate regulating bodies to ensure that programs, policies and procedures involving civil rights, civil liberties and privacy considerations are addressed in an integrated and comprehensive manner.
reference_document_element_description: Execute data subject rights requests within regulatory timelines, including identity verification, request scope determination, response preparation, exemption assessment, and fulfillment documentation.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-A-001 (RC, cosine: 0.529), SP-T-005 (SP, cosine: 0.527).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.3/10 (raw 0.326). Shared vocabulary: [rights]. DCWF-only terms [addressed, appropriate, bodies, civil, comprehensive, considerations] vs WIDAI-only terms [assessment, data, determination, documentation, execute, exemption] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.852 (P=0.854, R=0.851). Balanced P/R — the 29-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Coordinate with the appropriate regulating bodies to ensure that programs, polic" and "Execute data subject rights requests within regulatory timelines, including iden" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.598 > STS 0.326 (gap +0.272). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [rights] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.4%. Shared tokens: [rights]. DCWF-only: [addressed, appropriate, bodies, civil, comprehensive, considerations]. WIDAI-only: [assessment, data, determination, documentation, execute, exemption].

signals.detail: STS 0.326 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.

Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.272 with low STS 0.326. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
